description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are primarily light gray brick, complemented by wooden fencing and planters along the sides and rear. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a small green lawn, and a tree, while the backyard is enclosed and landscaped with additional greenery. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to outdoor spaces. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the open roof, and a mix of paved and green outdoor areas. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding garden spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light gray brick exterior, and landscaped front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, front lawn, and a prominent tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat brick wall, wooden fencing, and partial backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, wooden planters, and large windows opening to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with wooden fencing, a side entrance, and a clear view of the backyard lawn and tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
